'''dhajodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyeweed|dyeweed]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyeweed|dyeweed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhajodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæjedeth|dhæjedeth]] || [[word:dhæjedej|dhæjedej]] || [[word:dhæjedesh|dhæjedesh]] || [[word:dhæjede|dhæjede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajojodoth|dhajojodoth]] || [[word:dhajojodoj|dhajojodoj]] || [[word:dhajojodosh|dhajojodosh]] || [[word:dhajojodo|dhajojodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajodoth|dhajodoth]] || [[word:dhajodoj|dhajodoj]] || [[word:dhajodosh|dhajodosh]] || [[word:dhajodo|dhajodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajofdoth|dhajofdoth]] || [[word:dhajofdoj|dhajofdoj]] || [[word:dhajofdosh|dhajofdosh]] || [[word:dhajofdof|dhajofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhajodotho|dhajodotho]] || [[word:dhajodojo|dhajodojo]] || [[word:dhajodosho|dhajodosho]] || [[word:dhajodoko|dhajodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhajodoth|dhajodoth]] || [[word:dhajodoj|dhajodoj]] || [[word:dhajodosh|dhajodosh]] || [[word:dhajodo|dhajodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhajodothol|dhajodothol]] || [[word:dhajodojol|dhajodojol]] || [[word:dhajodoshol|dhajodoshol]] || [[word:dhajodokol|dhajodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhajodothotho|dhajodothotho]] || [[word:dhajodojojo|dhajodojojo]] || [[word:dhajodoshosho|dhajodoshosho]] || [[word:dhajodoko|dhajodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhajodothon|dhajodothon]] || [[word:dhajodojon|dhajodojon]] || [[word:dhajodoshon|dhajodoshon]] || [[word:dhajodokon|dhajodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhajodothoro|dhajodothoro]] || [[word:dhajodojoro|dhajodojoro]] || [[word:dhajodoshoro|dhajodoshoro]] || [[word:dhajodokoro|dhajodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
